notice: Unofficial evidence index; official judges determine the score.

runnability.evidence: Exact dependency pins, local procedural MJCF, fixed seed, fast/quick/headless modes, and a physics-running validator.

depth_of_mujoco_use.evidence: Free/slide/hinge joints, contacts, friction, compliant springs, touch/joint/frame sensors, adhesion actuators, applied forces, and a runtime mechanical lock.

task_design.evidence: Every stage is mechanically dependent: physical code -> lock release -> lid push -> five-contact grasp -> force recovery -> free-body delivery.

control.evidence: 250 Hz sensor-gated state machine, measured-travel transitions, per-digit tactile preload, and 48 paired randomized physics rollouts.

dexterous_manipulation.evidence: Five independent radial digits, five required stable contacts, individual tactile reflexes, no grasp weld, and physical force rejection.

engineering_quality.evidence: Compact typed source, exact config, dynamic validator, structured trajectory/report/evaluation/policy artifacts, and explicit invariants.

presentation.evidence: 960x540 generated video, automatic detail/wide cameras, live code/lock/lid/contact/slip telemetry, progress, and SRT captions.

innovation.evidence: A tactile-only emergency lockbox whose simulated cybersecurity, access mechanics, and grasp reflex are physically inspectable.
